mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, author, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_promotion_posts WHERE del_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') )
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, title, content, author, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at, del_yn, DATE_FORMAT(del_dt, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS del_dt FROM tb_promotion_posts WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, title, author, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_promotion_posts WHERE id > #{id} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, title, author, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM tb_promotion_posts WHERE id < #{id} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_promotion_posts ( title, content, author, created_at, updated_at, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{author}, NOW(), NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_promotion_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, author = #{author}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE tb_promotion_posts SET del_yn = 'Y', del_dt = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_yn = 'N'
